raw_block:
–(Household idols)
–Used by Laban, stolen by Rachael (equivalent to a deed to all 
of Laban’ s property, according to the Nuzi tablets)Ge 31:19,30-35
–Used by Micah, stolen by the DanitesJud 17:5;18:14,17-20
–Condemned and disposed of by JacobGe 35:2-4; with 31:35-39
–Destroyed by Josiah
  .SeeIDOLS
